# Vendored browser dependencies

`d3.v7.min.js` is D3 7.9.0, downloaded from the official `d3` package on
jsDelivr for an offline, content-security-policy-friendly evaluation workspace.

- Upstream: <https://github.com/d3/d3>
- Package asset: <https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/d3@7.9.0/dist/d3.min.js>
- License: ISC (see `d3.LICENSE`)
- SHA-256: `f2094bbf6141b359722c4fe454eb6c4b0f0e42cc10cc7af921fc158fceb86539`

The application never loads the CDN URL at runtime.
